assertionResults.reason: Login flow behaved correctly: invalid password showed "Invalid password.", valid password "change-me" redirected to workspace, and operator-only destructive controls (Delete channel) were visible after login.
On /download-queue, selecting channels updated queue content and switching tabs (Transcripts → Summaries → Evals) refreshed queue data and URL queue params accordingly.

frictions.description: `wait --text "Download queue"` timed out because that exact heading text was not rendered on the page.
frictions.resolution: Validated queue navigation/state via URL checks, interactive snapshots, tab selection state, and screenshots instead of relying on that text selector.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests --filter ...` intermittently returned no lines despite captured traffic.
frictions.resolution: Exported full captured requests and produced concise summary logs via `rg` for assertion-specific network evidence.
